name: Cardinal Ethanol, LLC
summary: Cardinal Ethanol, LLC produces and sells fuel-grade ethanol, distillers grains, corn oil, and carbon dioxide in the continental United States. The company's ethanol is used as an octane enhancer in fuels; an oxygenated fuel additive for reducing ozone and carbon monoxide emissions; and a non-petroleum-based gasoline substitute. It also offers distillers grains, which are used as animal feed supplement for dairy, beef, poultry, and swine industries; corn oil that is used as a feed ingredient, feedstock to produce biodiesel, and for other industrial uses; and carbon dioxide gas. Cardinal Ethanol, LLC sells its products directly, as well as through third party brokers. The company was formerly known as Indiana Ethanol, LLC and changed its name to Cardinal Ethanol, LLC in September 2005. Cardinal Ethanol, LLC was founded in 2005 and is based in Union City, Indiana.
